name: Habib ibn Abdullah
title: Nahshali Helper
shortDescription: A loyal and brave companion of Imam Hussain (AS) in Karbala who fought valiantly defending Wilayah and was martyred.
fullStory:
Habib ibn Abdullah al-Nahshali is another bright and lesser-known star of the Ashura event. He was from the Bani Nahshal tribe and a sincere and devoted Shia in Kufa.

Despite all the threats and restrictions the Umayyad government had created in Kufa, Habib ibn Abdullah managed to escape the clutches of oppression and join the Master of Martyrs' (AS) camp in Karbala.

On the tenth day of Muharram, as the sun of Karbala witnessed an unequal battle between the army of light and the army of darkness, Habib ibn Abdullah also entered the battlefield with the Imam's permission.

With faith full of love for the Ahl al-Bayt (AS) and to assist the most oppressed Imam in history, he manfully wielded his sword. After a fierce and manifest struggle, he finally sacrificed his life on this sacred path and was greeted with peace and salutations by the Imam of the Time (ATF) in Ziyarat al-Nahiya al-Muqaddasa.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلى حَبِيبِ بْنِ عَبْدِاللَّهِ النَّهْشَلِيِّ...
quote: (From Ziyarat Nahiya:) Peace be upon Habib ibn Abdullah al-Nahshali.
